layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the crypto market — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deep in 'Extreme Fear' territory with a score of 25/100, and it's getting worse. Most altcoins are bleeding while Bitcoin holds steady, sucking liquidity away from smaller coins. While a few candidates like Lido DAO show some bullish chart patterns, the overall environment is hostile for new swing trades. Catching a falling knife in this kind of market usually leads to losses.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines with cash ready. Wait for fear to stabilize or reverse before deploying capital. Watch Lido DAO for a pullback toward $0.33 as a potential entry if the broader market stops deteriorating.
expert_reasoning: In this cycle, every candidate has significant issues. BONK is in freefall with a -2.0 chart bias — pure capitulation with no reversal signal yet. AERO and ONDO have mildly bullish charts but neutral RSI and poor risk/reward ratios (~0.4x). ETH has a near-oversold RSI (39) which is a historically reliable signal, but it's below all moving averages with -0.7 chart bias. LDO stands out with the highest chart bias (+0.85) and a Three White Soldiers pattern, but it's already extended (+51.7% in 5 days) and today's -5.9% drop could be the start of a correction. With Fear & Greed at 25 and worsening, BTC dominance at 56.5% crushing alts, and geopolitical risk headlines (oil supply concerns), the prudent move is to wait for a cleaner entry. I'll monitor LDO for a pullback to the $0.33 area where risk/reward improves significantly.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear at 25 and worsening — market could cascade lower on any negative catalyst
BTC dominance at 56.5% actively suppressing altcoin performance across the board
Geopolitical oil supply risk cited by CryptoSlate could trigger a broader risk-off event over the weekend
watch_list: LDO price action — watch for a pullback to $0.33 support with RSI cooling to ~45 for entry
Bitcoin behavior around $64,000-$65,000 — a break below $63,000 would signal further alt weakness
Fear & Greed Index — any stabilization above 30 would improve the environment for new trades
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100, worsening) with BTC dominance at 56.5% crushing altcoin performance. Geopolitical tensions around oil supply add macro uncertainty heading into the weekend.
context_banner: Extreme Fear dominates the market — disciplined traders wait for fear to stabilize before deploying capital into oversold setups.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 25 (Extreme Fear) and trending worse week-over-week, signaling high risk for new long entries.
ETH RSI at 39 approaching oversold — historically reliable signal — but chart structure remains bearish with price below all MAs.
LDO shows Three White Soldiers and +0.85 chart bias, the strongest bullish setup among candidates, but already extended after +51.7% in 5 days.
Weekend geopolitical risk with 20% of global oil supply in the balance could trigger broader risk-off selling across crypto.
Massive BTC call spreads targeting $72,000 by month-end suggest institutional conviction in Bitcoin, reinforcing BTC dominance and alt weakness.
